heroDescription: Simple, secure and extremely lightweight. Built with Vanilla TypeScript and focused on performance.
securityText: Vixt uses the native Virtual DOM to automatically sanitize all variables inserted into the HTML, natively preventing XSS (Cross-Site Scripting) attacks without overhead.
featureReactivityDesc: Based on native JavaScript Proxies, no Virtual DOM required.
featureSecurityDesc: Automatic input sanitization and XSS protection via Template Literals.
featurePerformanceDesc: Zero dependencies in the final build. Pure and optimized output.
